# Wisdom

**Collected aphorisms and portable truths.**

---

## Personal Aphorisms

> **Name the mode you are in before acting on it.**

Clarity about your current operating mode prevents costly category errors.

> **Lead with listening before leading with answers.**

The first move in almost any interaction should be to understand before being understood.

> **Being right and being kind are not mutually exclusive choices.**

Correctness without care is its own kind of failure worth avoiding.
